## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New rule / feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -W clippy::all -W clippy::pedantic -W clippy::nursery -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] Updated/added tests for the change
- [ ] Reviewed snapshot changes (`cargo insta review`) if serialization changed

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should focus on, trade-offs you made, or follow-ups you're
deferring.
